## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on SentinelOne's upcoming content release and GrowthX.ai's development progress for the new platform.](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [SentinelOne plans first content release on new platform by Oct 7; GrowthX.ai aims for go-live \~3rd week of Oct](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [Nicolas needs GitHub access to SentinelOne's repo for frontend work; onboarding process initiated](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Key components discussed: Algolia Search, CVE database, sitemaps, SEO elements](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Design near-complete; Nicolas meeting George tomorrow to finalize filters and other details](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

## Topics

### Development Progress and Integration

  - [Nicolas examined ContentStack, considering JSON RTE field for custom components (e.g., timeline)](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=121.0)
  - [Frontend to be built in SentinelOne's Next.js codebase; Nicolas needs repo access](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)
  - [Using Tailwind for styles, creating custom components as needed](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=320.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai's generation pipeline runs independently, not blocking progress](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)

### Timeline and Release Plans

  - [SentinelOne releasing first content on new platform Oct 7](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=96.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai aiming for go-live around 3rd week of October](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=391.0)
  - [Designs near completion with minor changes pending](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

### Technical Components and Dependencies

  - [Implementing Algolia Search, including for CVE database](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Developing sitemaps and SEO components](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=66.0)
  - [Nicolas to integrate search fields and filters with Algolia post-initial development](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [SEO tags/info to be generated by GrowthX.ai's pipeline and integrated into ContentStack](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)

### Collaboration and Access

  - [John to initiate GitHub access request for Nicolas](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Additional team member access may take 1-2 weeks due to onboarding process](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
  - [Nicolas to provide names of any additional team members needing access](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=259.0)

### Content Filtering and Design

  - [Marisol provided mandatory filter requirements](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=450.0)
  - [Nicolas meeting with George to review design and discuss filters](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Ankit and Marisol available for additional context on content filters if needed](https://fathom.video/share/DnCNCJ5aC1ssH5sh1cx9cNx8LgyLCHUj?tab=summary&timestamp=434.0)

## Next Steps
